nasb.text: Mattaniah, Bakbukiah, Obadiah, Meshullam, Talmon and Akkub were gatekeepers keeping watch at the storehouses of the gates.

esv.text: Mattaniah, Bakbukiah, Obadiah, Meshullam, Talmon, and Akkub were gatekeepers standing guard at the storehouses of the gates.

cnv.text: 瑪他尼、八布迦、俄巴底亞、米書蘭、達們和亞谷都是守門的，守衛城門的庫房。

ccb.text: 负责守卫库房的是玛他尼、八布迦、俄巴底亚、米书兰、达们和亚谷。
